environment_prompt: A desert-like industrial compound with corrugated metal structures and shipping containers on both sides, DANGER and KEEP OUT warning signs, a narrow sandy pathway between the structures, a metal gate opening on the left side, wooden beams and a skeletal canopy overhead casting sharp shadows, bright sunlight with strong contrast, dusty ground with warm yellow tones, tight corridor-like layout guiding the eye forward, immersive combat-zone atmosphere. Off-screen behind the left gate: an enemy position from which a smoke grenade can be thrown. In the distance ahead down the corridor: open space from which a flashbang grenade can be lobbed toward the viewer.
perspective_prompt: First-person FPS game view with a modern assault rifle (equipped with a holographic sight) held in the lower right foreground, aimed forward down the corridor, classic shooter game camera position.

interactions.action: A smoke grenade is thrown out from the gate on the left, exploding into a cloud of smoke.
A flashbang grenade is thrown from the distance and detonates, filling the center of the screen with blinding white light. The viewer raises a hand to shield from the intense light.
